recommendations.title: Dog
recommendations.overview: An army ranger and his dog embark on a road trip along the Pacific Coast Highway to attend a friend's funeral.

recommendations.title: Mother's Day
recommendations.overview: Crazed members of a sadistic family return to their childhood home to terrorize the new owners.

recommendations.title: Shot Caller
recommendations.overview: A newly-released prison gangster is forced by the leaders of his gang to orchestrate a major crime with a brutal rival gang on the streets of Southern California.

recommendations.title: Time Lapse
recommendations.overview: Three friends discover a mysterious machine that takes pictures 24 hours into the future and conspire to use it for personal gain, until disturbing and dangerous images begin to develop.

recommendations.title: In Time
recommendations.overview: In the not-too-distant future, the aging gene has been switched off. To avoid overpopulation, time has become the currency and the way people pay for luxuries and necessities. The rich can live forever, while the rest struggle to negotiate for their

recommendations.title: 10 Years
recommendations.overview: A group of friends reunite ten years after their high-school graduation.

recommendations.title: Bokeh
recommendations.overview: On a romantic getaway to Iceland, a young American couple wake up one morning to discover every person on Earth has disappeared. Their struggle to survive and to reconcile the mysterious event lead them to reconsider everything they know about themse

recommendations.title: Blood and Bone
recommendations.overview: In Los Angeles, an ex-con takes the underground fighting world by storm in his quest to fulfill a promise to a dead friend.

recommendations.title: Brother
recommendations.overview: A Japanese Yakuza gangster's deadly existence in his homeland gets him exiled to Los Angeles, where he is taken in by his little brother and his brother's gang.  Original Title: ブラザー

recommendations.title: Insomnia
recommendations.overview: Two Los Angeles homicide detectives are dispatched to a northern town where the sun doesn't set to investigate the methodical murder of a local teen.
